queries.question: show the theatrical release date for all movies
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?theatrical_release_date WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?movies p:theatrical_release_date ?theatrical_release_date .
}

queries.question: What dates was Selma released to theatres and to stream and who directed the film?
queries.sql: select streaming_release_date, theatrical_release_date, name from movies join Directors on Directors.id = movies.director_id where title = 'Selma'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?streaming_release_date ?theatrical_release_date ?name WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?movies p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?movies p:streaming_release_date ?streaming_release_date .
  ?movies p:theatrical_release_date ?theatrical_release_date .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Selma")
}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>

  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?movies p:streaming_release_date ?streaming_release_date .
}

queries.question: When was Selma released in theatres and who directed it?
queries.sql: select theatrical_release_date, name from movies join Directors on Directors.id = movies.director_id where title = 'Selma'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?theatrical_release_date ?name WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?movies p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?movies p:theatrical_release_date ?theatrical_release_date .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Selma")
}

queries.question: who directed 'Selma' and when was it released?
queries.sql: select streaming_release_date, name from movies join Directors on Directors.id = movies.director_id where title = 'Selma'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?streaming_release_date ?name WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?movies p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?movies p:streaming_release_date ?streaming_release_date .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Selma")
}
